summary: I ran the full test suite and linter for this iteration's implementer changes (the pause/restart-define human-in-the-loop feature). `bin/rails test` (RAILS_ENV=test, PARALLEL_WORKERS=1 to avoid a fork hang in this sandbox) passed 238 runs / 786 assertions with 0 failures/errors, and `bin/rubocop` (rubocop-rails-omakase) found no offenses across 151 files. `db:test:prepare` applied the new `add_pause_support_to_phases` migration cleanly against the isolated `pipeliner_test` database (no development/production data touched). Verdict: **pass**, written to `.pipeliner/phases/03-build/main/test-critic/verdict.json`.
